speaker: speaker1
text: Hello ! I'm sorry to bother you . This is a complimentary fruit tray . Your food will be ready soon .

speaker: speaker2
text: Wow ! It's a fruit sculpture ! Your chef is a real artist !

speaker: speaker1
text: Actually , uh , I made it myself ...

speaker: speaker2
text: You did ? Wow ! Where did you learn ...

speaker: speaker1
text: Sorry , but I've gotta run . Enjoy your food , and ring the service button if you need anything else !
